result:
30/30 tests pass. The RuntimeWarnings are harmless (venv path resolution from a subdirectory) and don't affect test results.

Added to `src/minigit.py`:
- `status` — prints staged files or `(none)`
- `diff <c1> <c2>` — shows Added/Removed/Modified files between two commits
- `checkout <hash>` — restores files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- `reset <hash>` — moves HEAD without touching working directory
- `rm <file>` — removes a file from the staging index
- `show <hash>` — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent
